title: HOTFIX 1.0.1 — Windows subfolder LoRA/upscale path-separator bug
description: v1.0.0 cannot load any LoRA or upscale model stored in a SUBFOLDER on Windows (Value not in list → Prompt outputs failed validation → 400). Root cause + exact fix in brief.md. Apply fix, bump 1.0.0 → 1.0.1, rebuild per-OS portable artifacts, release. Fix already proven on the RunPod branch.
